articles.title: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 10 Mart 2026
articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 10 Mart 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 10 Mart 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: NASA’s DART asteroid smash shows we could deflect a future threat
articles.title_tr: NASA’s DART asteroid smash shows we could deflect a future threat
articles.summary: When NASA’s DART spacecraft deliberately crashed into the asteroid moonlet Dimorphos, it did more than change the asteroid’s local orbit — it slightly shifted the path of the entire asteroid pair around the Sun. The impact blasted debris into space, doubling the force of the spacecraft’s hit and nudging the system’s solar orbit by a tiny but measurable amount. It marks the first time humans have altered the trajectory of a celestial object around the Sun. The result strengthens the case for using spacecraft impacts as a future planetary defense strategy.

articles.title: Scientists detect a sudden acceleration in global warming
articles.title_tr: Scientists detect a sudden acceleration in global warming
articles.summary: Global warming has picked up speed in the past decade, according to a new analysis from the Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK). By removing short term natural influences such as El Niño, volcanic eruptions, and solar cycles from temperature records, researchers uncovered a clear acceleration in the planet’s long term warming trend beginning around 2015.

articles.title: BMW iX3
articles.title_tr: BMW iX3
articles.summary:
SUV has all-new platform, drivetrain, battery and digital interface. The brand’s electric reboot starts here

UK deliveries of the first of BMW’s much-anticipated ‘Neue Klasse’ of electric cars - the BMW iX3 - have begun. And Munich’s hope is that the first time you see one on the road, you won’t react with an “oh”, an “ah” - or even an “eurgh” - as you might have at other model renewals of the last decade. They’re aiming for a “wow”.You'll have already read how this is the first of a whole new generation of BMWs; how significant the company thinks its 'New Class' platform is; and how this is its first software-defined car. The new platform will underpin at least six new EVs by 2028, including an electric 3 Series (to be called the i3). Clearly, this isn’t an unimportant car.But beyond all the hype, just know that, first and foremost, the iX3 is a BMW that in may ways drives in the traditional BMW style; and in other ways, it really qiute starkly unlike anything traditional whatsoever.

articles.title: Hidden metabolism found operating inside the cell nucleus
articles.title_tr: Hidden metabolism found operating inside the cell nucleus
articles.summary: Researchers have found hundreds of metabolic enzymes attached to human DNA inside the cell nucleus. Different tissues and cancers show unique patterns of these enzymes, forming a “nuclear metabolic fingerprint.” Some of the enzymes gather around damaged DNA to assist with repair. The discovery reveals an unexpected link between metabolism and gene regulation that could influence how cancers grow and respond to treatment.

articles.title: Light-guided evolution creates proteins that can switch, sense, and compute
articles.title_tr: Light-guided evolution creates proteins that can switch, sense, and compute
articles.summary: Researchers have created a method called optovolution that uses light to guide the evolution of proteins with dynamic behaviors. By engineering yeast cells so their survival depended on proteins switching states at the right time, scientists could rapidly select the best-performing variants. The technique produced new light-sensitive proteins that respond to different colors and improved optogenetic systems. It even evolved a protein that behaves like a tiny logic gate, activating genes only when two signals are present.

articles.title: Scientists found a surprising way to make exercise work better
articles.title_tr: Scientists found a surprising way to make exercise work better
articles.summary: Exercise normally boosts the body’s ability to use oxygen, a key marker of health and longevity — but high blood sugar can block that benefit. Researchers found that a ketogenic diet helped mice normalize blood sugar and dramatically improved how their muscles responded to exercise. Their muscles became better at using oxygen and built more endurance fibers. The results suggest diet and exercise may work together in surprising ways to improve metabolic health.

articles.title: Survivor dokunulmazlık oyunu kim kazandı?
articles.title_tr: Survivor dokunulmazlık oyunu kim kazandı?
articles.summary: Survivor 2026 Ünlüler ve Gönüllüler'de dokunulmazlık oyunu için geri sayım sona erdi. Zorlu, eğlenceli parkurlarıyla tansiyonun her geçen gün arttığı Survivor'da, Ünlüler ve Gönüllüler haftanın ilk dokunulmazlığını kazanmak  için karşı karşıya geldi. Dokunulmazlık oyununu kaybeden taraf ise ada konseyinde haftanın ilk eleme adayını belirledi. Peki, Survivor dokunulmazlık oyunu kim kazandı? 9 Mart Pazartesi Survivor eleme adayı kim oldu? İşte 9 Mart Pazartesi Survivor'da dokunulmazlığı kazanan takım...

articles.title: Google Pomelli Türkiye’de Kullanıma Sunuldu!
articles.title_tr: Google Pomelli Türkiye’de Kullanıma Sunuldu!
articles.summary: Dijital pazarlama ve içerik üretimi dünyasında taşları yerinden oynatacak devasa gelişmeler yaşanmaya devam ediyor. Teknoloji devi Google tarafından geliştirilen ve dünya çapında büyük ses getiren yenilikçi yapay zeka asistanı Pomelli resmi olarak Türkiye pazarında da kullanıma sunuldu. Özellikle dijital dünyada varlık göstermek isteyen ancak devasa bütçelere sahip olmayan işletmeler için adeta eşsiz kurtarıcı niteliği taşıyan […]

articles.title: Panenka disaster! West Ham punish Brentford in FA Cup shoot‑out
articles.title_tr: Panenka disaster! West Ham punish Brentford in FA Cup shoot‑out
articles.summary: Dango Ouattara was the penalty villain for Brentford as his failed Panenka in the shoot-out cost the Bees - and sent West Ham to the FA Cup quarter-finals at their expense.
articles.summary_tr: Dango Ouattara was the penalty villain for Brentford as his failed Panenka in the shoot-out cost the Bees - and sent West Ham to the FA Cup quarter-finals at their expense.
